query:
SELECT 'Total' as segment, COUNT(*) as count FROM customers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Recent', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'recent'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Lapsed', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'lapsed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Unknown', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'unknown'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'New', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'new'
